name: Credit Reporting Services
description_short: Credit Reporting Services is a credit repair provider based in San Francisco, California. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Credit Reporting Services is a credit repair provider serving clients in San Francisco, California. The company serves consumers in the San Francisco area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a credit counseling service, software company, Credit Reporting Services provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in San Francisco, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Reporting Services operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the San Francisco, California area who are considering Credit Reporting Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
